seoTitle: How to Get Zendesk Certification: Exam Prep Guide
metaDescription: Prepare for and pass an official Zendesk Certification exam by picking the right track, using Zendesk Academy's study guides, and registering to test.
intro: An official Zendesk credential can help validate your configuration skills for a resume or client proposal. This guide covers choosing between certification tracks, finding the free study materials, practicing in a sandbox, and registering for your proctored exam.

steps.heading: Choose your certification path
steps.body: Decide between tracks like Support Administrator Expert or a specialized module based on your role and goals.

steps.heading: Download the study guide
steps.body: Launch Zendesk Academy and download the free official study guide to review the tested objective domains.

steps.heading: Take a practice test
steps.body: Register for the on-demand certification practice test to gauge how ready you are before scheduling the real exam.

steps.heading: Practice in a sandbox
steps.body: Set up a temporary personal sandbox instance so you can practice real business workflows hands-on.

steps.heading: Register for the proctored exam
steps.body: Navigate to the proctoring portal to finalize your registration and fee payment.

steps.heading: Prepare for test day
steps.body: Review the online testing code of conduct and set up a quiet, compliant space before your exam.

faq.question: How many Zendesk certification levels are there?
faq.answer: Zendesk's certification matrix distinguishes between Specialist, Expert, and Developer badges depending on the track.

faq.question: Is the practice test the same as the real exam?
faq.answer: The on-demand practice test is designed to mirror the real exam format so you can gauge readiness beforehand.

faq.question: What topics tend to trip people up on the exam?
faq.answer: Scenario questions involving automated triggers, SLA policies, and data security updates are commonly cited as tricky.

faq.question: Can I take the exam remotely?
faq.answer: Yes, Zendesk certification exams are typically available through remote proctoring in addition to in-person test centers.
